kubernetesVersion.description: The version of Kubernetes specified by the user.

currentKubernetesVersion.description: The current version of Kubernetes running on the cluster.

dnsPrefix.description: This cannot be updated once the managed cluster has been created.

fqdn.description: The FQDN of the master pool.

servicePrincipalProfile.description: Information about the service principal identity for the cluster.

addonProfiles.description: The profile of managed cluster add-on.

nodeResourceGroup.description: The name of the resource group containing agent pool nodes.

enablePodSecurityPolicy.description: Whether to enable Kubernetes pod security policy (deprecated).

autoScalerProfile.description: Parameters to be applied to the cluster autoscaler.

apiServerAccessProfile.description: Access profile for managed cluster API server.

diskEncryptionSetID.description: The resource ID of the disk encryption set.
